files.patch:
@@ -42,7 +42,8 @@ jobs:
           echo "$DEVELOPER_ID_INSTALLER_CERT_BASE64" | base64 --decode > "$INSTALLER_CERT_PATH"
 
           security create-keychain -p "$RUNNER_TEMP" "$KEYCHAIN_PATH"
-          security default-keychain -s "$KEYCHAIN_PATH"
+          security list-keychains -d user -s "$KEYCHAIN_PATH"
+          security default-keychain -d user -s "$KEYCHAIN_PATH"
           security unlock-keychain -p "$RUNNER_TEMP" "$KEYCHAIN_PATH"
           security set-keychain-settings -lut 21600 "$KEYCHAIN_PATH"
           security import "$APP_CERT_PATH" -k "$KEYCHAIN_PATH" -P "$DEVELOPER_ID_APPLICATION_CERT_PASSWORD" -T /usr/bin/codesign -T /usr/bin/security
